other_details.introduction: This is a Spring roll part of the Hors d'Oeuvres for Simone Rocha on the 5th of February, it's a Spring roll filled with 20g of Vegetarian Filling and then rolled as you would. It will be served with Homemade Sweet Chili Sauce.
other_details.notes: Ideally the presentation, half shell cockles all face up around in a circle, with a drape of sauce on top, picked chervil and chicken skin.
